AC: 20
STR: +10 DEX: +5 AGI: +5 HP: +50 ENDUR: +35
SV FIRE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 05 2002 at 5:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yea this is definately one of if not the best DROPPABLE monk bracers. of course there are better then this but as far as being able to be sold this takes the cake.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 04 2002 at 5:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) everyone stfu about it being a monk item, we know it's a monk item thats the reason it says monk only idiots. This is the best droppable monk bracer or one of the best in the game . no arguments.
#REDACTED, Posted: May 15 2002 at 11:52 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) See not all monks shout its a monk item =)
for a monk
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 11:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719793007891
34 posts
I think,hmm,I think this loot should go to a monk -- no wait! -- no, no, definitely a monk.

Wow
QuoteReply
# May 06 2002 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
For a droppable bracer, this thing is mustard. For those of you bashing this thing, you've absolutely no idea about monk equipment and how difficult it is to find. Sure, there are better bracers, in ToV... I'm personally not crazy about armor, but I have a friend who is, and he'd gladly dish out 40k for this thing. There is no tradeable item for wrist slot that will be better than this, for now.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 17 2001 at 9:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) THIS IS SO FOR MONKS... I just couldn't help it. # Jun 14 2001 at 9:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361444191
16 posts
For those saying the stats on this aren't the best, you should know that some (possibly all) loot off tormax has been upgraded on the test server so hopefully they'll decide they like the changes and they will go to the live servers within the next patch or two (I know this because when the SK from my guild got transferred over to test to compete in the BoTB recently he had some loot from Tormax on him and the stats changed when he got there

!!!!!!!!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 1:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
WTF!!!! this is so a monk item, why hasn't anyone said that yet!!!! i have a level 20 monk so i know what i'm talking about, i know monks and monk gear and this is monk gear if i've ever seen one!! i bet this thing goes to stupid necromancers or something on raids though because people use need before greed to **** monks over!! necromancers don't need this, it's definately something guilds should take thier monks to get because only monks should be able to wear anything half decent!! what the ****, on a raid everyone would roll for this just to **** over monks who never get anything!! need before greed should definately be used for this ubar peice, why the hell do people besides monks get it!! WTF!!1!1!!!!11!!!1!! this better be given to monks at raids because monks don't get ubar gear!!!! monks need more l33t lewtz!!! we get nothing!!! powar to the monks!! Monk civil rights!! forget everyone but monks, no one else needs gear!! i hear by declare every peice of semi-decent loot which would normally go to any other class but monk be instantly given to any monks in the group due to the lack of good items for monks as you can clearly see above!! i bet the guy who looted that was a magician or something!! WTF, magicians don't need those stats, but i bet he's wearing it now!!

doh! this is monk only....never mind everything about how someone else would get it need before greed, but they sure as hell would roll on it if they had the opertunity because it's all a conspiracy to destroy the monk cause!! monks are god!! i'm a monk, giv me your gear please, my class has nothing even though a new peice of monk only gear, and usually more than that show up on this sight every damn night!! monk NBG everything ubar tks yu^^!!

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 04 2001 at 11:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Rlax a bit will you, its just a game
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 08 2002 at 11:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) And besides that... as the young kids that think money can buy you everything good in the game.. this is a monk only item.. so therefore. YES.. it is a monk item.. theres no debating that.. and I want one. :D
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 14 2002 at 11:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It was a joke post.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 14 2001 at 8:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As soon as I saw this I said, "Yup, here's that monk hero bracer y'all wanted" Gratz =P

# Mar 19 2002 at 4:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759026528
10 posts
Human monks can, in fact, wear Hero Bracers, (and I do, although it's a little heavy), and all monks can wear the Dragon Hero Bracer.

Aside from that, comparing this item to a Hero Bracer is like comparing Crafted to Cobalt. =P
